<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>HNP Builders Ghana Limited — Building Tomorrow, Together</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg: #F1EFE6;
    --bg-2: #EAE6D8;
    --card: #FFFFFF;
    --ink: #16150F;
    --ink-soft: #58554A;
    --ink-faint: #8B8779;
    --gold-1: #E3A825;
    --gold-2: #B9860B;
    --gold-3: #FFDD8A;
    --gold-line: rgba(185,134,11,0.35);
    --steel: #171F24;
    --steel-2: #0D1316;
    --safety: #D8531B;
    --radius: 14px;
    --wrap: 1180px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    cursor:none;
  }
  @media (max-width: 860px){
    body{cursor:auto;}
  }
  ::selection{background:var(--gold-1); color:#16150F;}
  a{color:inherit; text-decoration:none;}
  img{max-width:100%; display:block;}
  .wrap{max-width:var(--wrap); margin:0 auto; padding:0 28px;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12.5px;
    letter-spacing:.14em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold-2);
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{content:''; width:22px; height:1.5px; background:var(--gold-2); display:inline-block;}
  h1,h2,h3{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    margin:0;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
    color:var(--ink);
  }
  p{line-height:1.6; color:var(--ink-soft); margin:0;}

  /* ---------- custom cursor ---------- */
  #cursor-dot, #cursor-ring{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999;
    border-radius:50%;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    will-change:transform;
  }
  #cursor-dot{ width:6px; height:6px; background:var(--gold-1); }
  #cursor-ring{
    width:34px; height:34px;
    border:1.5px solid var(--gold-2);
    transition:width .25s ease, height .25s ease, border-color .25s ease, opacity .25s ease;
    opacity:.85;
  }
  #cursor-ring.big{ width:64px; height:64px; border-color:var(--ink); background:rgba(227,168,37,0.12); }
  @media (max-width: 860px){ #cursor-dot,#cursor-ring{display:none;} }

  /* ---------- nav ---------- */
  header{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:500;
    padding:18px 0;
    transition:background .35s ease, padding .35s ease, box-shadow .35s ease;
  }
  header.scrolled{
    background:rgba(241,239,230,0.82);
    backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(140%);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(140%);
    padding:11px 0;
    box-shadow:0 1px 0 var(--gold-line);
  }
  nav.wrap{display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:20px;}
  .brand{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:11px;}
  .brand img{width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:9px;}
  .brand .name{font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-weight:700; font-size:16.5px; line-height:1.1;}
  .brand .name span{display:block; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-weight:500; font-size:9.5px; letter-spacing:.12em; color:var(--gold-2); margin-top:2px;}
  .nav-links{display:flex; gap:30px; font-size:14.5px; font-weight:500;}
  .nav-links a{position:relative; padding:4px 0; color:var(--ink);}
  .nav-links a::after{content:''; position:absolute; left:0; bottom:0; width:0; height:2px; background:var(--gold-1); transition:width .25s ease;}
  .nav-links a.active{color:var(--gold-2);}
  .nav-links a.active::after{width:100%;}
  .nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%;}
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    padding:11px 20px; border-radius:999px;
    font-weight:600; font-size:13.5px;
    border:1.5px solid transparent;
    cursor:pointer;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .btn-gold{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-3),var(--gold-1) 55%, var(--gold-2));
    color:#20160A;
    box-shadow:0 8px 22px -8px rgba(185,134,11,0.65);
  }
  .btn-gold:hover{ filter:brightness(1.06); transform:translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-line{ border-color:rgba(22,21,15,0.25); color:var(--ink); }
  .btn-line:hover{ border-color:var(--ink); }
  .btn-line-light{ border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); color:#fff; }
  .btn-line-light:hover{ border-color:#fff; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
  .menu-toggle{display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; padding:6px;}
  .menu-toggle span{width:22px; height:2px; background:var(--ink); border-radius:2px;}
  @media (max-width: 860px){
    .nav-links{display:none;}
    .nav-cta{display:none;}
    .menu-toggle{display:flex;}
  }
  #mobile-menu{
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:600; background:var(--steel);
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:26px;
    transform:translateY(-100%); transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.7,0,.2,1);
  }
  #mobile-menu.open{transform:translateY(0);}
  #mobile-menu a{color:#F1EFE6; font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:26px; font-weight:600;}
  #mobile-menu .close-btn{position:absolute; top:22px; right:26px; background:none; border:none; color:#fff; font-size:28px; cursor:pointer;}

  /* ---------- hero ---------- */
  #hero{
    position:relative; min-height:100svh; display:flex; align-items:center;
    padding-top:110px; padding-bottom:60px;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 900px 500px at 82% 18%, rgba(227,168,37,0.16), transparent 60%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, #F5F3EA 0%, var(--bg) 55%, var(--bg) 100%);
  }
  #hero-canvas{position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; z-index:1;}
  .hero-grain{position:absolute; inset:0; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; opacity:.5; mix-blend-mode:multiply;
    background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(22,21,15,0.035) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size:3px 3px;}
  .hero-inner{position:relative; z-index:3; width:100%;}
  .hero-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.15fr 0.85fr; gap:40px; align-items:end;}
  @media (max-width: 980px){ .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .rating-pill{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:9px;
    background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--gold-line);
    padding:8px 16px 8px 10px; border-radius:999px; margin-bottom:22px;
    font-size:13px; font-weight:600;
    box-shadow:0 10px 24px -16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .rating-pill .stars{color:var(--gold-1); letter-spacing:1px;}
  h1.headline{
    font-size:clamp(40px, 6.4vw, 84px);
    line-height:0.98;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  h1.headline em{
    font-style:normal;
    background:linear-gradient(100deg,var(--gold-2),var(--gold-1) 45%,var(--safety));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent;
  }
  .hero-sub{font-size:17.5px; max-width:520px; margin-bottom:32px;}
  .hero-cta-row{display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:14px; margin-bottom:20px;}
  .hero-meta{display:flex; gap:26px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:34px; padding-top:26px; border-top:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.1);}
  .hero-meta div{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:11.5px; color:var(--ink-faint); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em;}
  .hero-meta strong{display:block; font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:22px; color:var(--ink); letter-spacing:0; text-transform:none; margin-bottom:2px;}
  .hero-side-card{
    background:var(--card); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:22px;
    border:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.08);
    box-shadow:0 30px 60px -30px rgba(20,15,5,0.35);
  }
  .hero-side-card img{border-radius:9px; margin-bottom:14px; aspect-ratio:4/3; object-fit:cover;}
  .hero-side-card .tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:11px; color:var(--gold-2); letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px;}
  .hero-side-card h3{font-size:17px;}
  .scroll-cue{
    position:absolute; bottom:26px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:3;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:.14em; color:var(--ink-faint); text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .scroll-cue .line{width:1px; height:34px; background:linear-gradient(var(--gold-2), transparent); animation:scrolldrop 1.8s infinite;}
  @keyframes scrolldrop{0%{transform:scaleY(0); transform-origin:top;} 50%{transform:scaleY(1); transform-origin:top;} 50.01%{transform-origin:bottom;} 100%{transform:scaleY(0); transform-origin:bottom;}}

  /* ---------- ticker ---------- */
  .ticker-band{
    background:var(--steel); overflow:hidden; padding:16px 0; border-top:1px solid rgba(227,168,37,.25); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(227,168,37,.25);
  }
  .ticker-track{display:flex; width:max-content; animation:ticker 32s linear infinite;}
  .ticker-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused;}
  @keyframes ticker{from{transform:translateX(0);} to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}
  .ticker-item{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:22px; padding:0 22px; font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-weight:600; font-size:18px; color:#EFE9D8; white-space:nowrap;}
  .ticker-item .dot{color:var(--gold-1); font-size:13px;}

  /* ---------- section base ---------- */
  section{padding:110px 0; position:relative;}
  .section-head{max-width:640px; margin-bottom:60px;}
  .section-head h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,46px); margin-top:14px;}
  .section-head p{margin-top:16px; font-size:16px;}
  .reveal{opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition:opacity .8s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), transform .8s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
  .reveal.in{opacity:1; transform:none;}

  /* ---------- services ---------- */
  .svc-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:rgba(22,21,15,0.09); border:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.09); border-radius:var(--radius); overflow:hidden;}
  @media (max-width: 900px){ .svc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
  @media (max-width: 600px){ .svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .svc-card{
    background:var(--card); padding:32px 26px; perspective:800px;
  }
  .svc-card .inner{transition:transform .18s ease-out;}
  .svc-icon{width:42px; height:42px; margin-bottom:22px; color:var(--gold-2);}
  .svc-num{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-faint); margin-bottom:10px; display:block;}
  .svc-card h3{font-size:19px; margin-bottom:9px;}
  .svc-card p{font-size:14.5px;}

  /* ---------- stats ---------- */
  .stats-band{background:var(--steel); color:#F1EFE6; padding:80px 0;}
  .stats-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:30px;}
  @media (max-width: 860px){ .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
  .stat{border-left:2px solid var(--gold-1); padding-left:18px;}
  .stat .num{font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:clamp(32px,4vw,48px); font-weight:700; color:var(--gold-1); line-height:1;}
  .stat p{color:#C9C4B2; margin-top:10px; font-size:14px;}

  /* ---------- gallery / coverflow ---------- */
  #gallery-stage{
    display:flex; gap:26px; overflow-x:auto; padding:30px 6vw 50px; scroll-snap-type:x proximity;
    perspective:1400px; -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  }
  #gallery-stage::-webkit-scrollbar{height:6px;}
  #gallery-stage::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold-line); border-radius:6px;}
  .gcard{
    flex:0 0 300px; scroll-snap-align:center;
    background:var(--card); border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.08);
    box-shadow:0 24px 50px -26px rgba(20,15,5,0.4);
    transition:transform .12s ease-out;
    will-change:transform;
  }
  .gcard .ph{aspect-ratio:4/3; overflow:hidden;}
  .gcard .ph img{width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover;}
  .gcard .cap{padding:18px 20px;}
  .gcard .cap .tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--gold-2); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; margin-bottom:6px;}
  .gcard .cap h3{font-size:16.5px;}

  /* ---------- offers ---------- */
  .offer-wrap{display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr; gap:50px; align-items:center;}
  @media (max-width: 900px){ .offer-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .offer-flyer{border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.08); box-shadow:0 30px 60px -30px rgba(20,15,5,0.35); max-width:340px;}
  .offer-cards{display:grid; gap:14px;}
  .offer-card{
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:16px;
    background:var(--card); border:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.08); border-radius:12px; padding:20px 22px;
    border-left:3px solid var(--gold-1);
  }
  .offer-card h4{font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:17px; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .offer-card .loc-tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--ink-faint); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em;}
  .offer-card .price{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-weight:600; color:var(--gold-2); font-size:15px; white-space:nowrap;}
  .offer-note{margin-top:18px; font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-faint);}

  /* ---------- reviews ---------- */
  .review-wrap{display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.8fr 1.2fr; gap:50px; align-items:center;}
  @media (max-width: 900px){ .review-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .review-score{background:var(--card); border-radius:20px; padding:40px; text-align:center; border:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.08); box-shadow:0 30px 60px -30px rgba(20,15,5,.35);}
  .review-score .big{font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:64px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold-2); line-height:1;}
  .review-score .stars{color:var(--gold-1); font-size:24px; letter-spacing:4px; margin:14px 0 8px;}
  .review-score p{font-size:13.5px;}
  .trust-list{display:grid; gap:16px;}
  .trust-item{display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; padding:18px 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(22,21,15,0.08);}
  .trust-item svg{width:22px; height:22px; flex-shrink:0; color:var(--gold-2); margin-top:2px;}
  .trust-item h4{font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:5px;}
  .trust-item p{font-size:14px;}

  /* ---------- contact ---------- */
  #contact{background:var(--steel); color:#F1EFE6;}
  #contact .section-head p{color:#B9B4A2;}
  #contact .eyebrow{color:var(--gold-1);}
  #contact .eyebrow::before{background:var(--gold-1);}
  .contact-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr; gap:50px;}
  @media (max-width: 900px){ .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .contact-line{display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:flex-start; padding:20px 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(241,239,230,0.12);}
  .contact-line svg{width:22px; height:22px; color:var(--gold-1); margin-top:3px; flex-shrink:0;}
  .contact-line .lbl{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:10.5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.09em; color:#8A8778; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .contact-line .val{font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:19px; font-weight:600;}
  .contact-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius:16px; padding:32px;}
  .contact-card h3{color:#fff; font-size:20px; margin-bottom:18px;}
  .social-row{display:flex; gap:12px; margin-top:22px;}
  .social-row a{width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:border-color .2s, background .2s;}
  .social-row a:hover{border-color:var(--gold-1); background:rgba(227,168,37,0.1);}
  .social-row svg{width:18px; height:18px; color:#F1EFE6;}
  .map-embed{
    margin-top:44px; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    position:relative; height:340px;
  }
  .map-embed::after{
    content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
    box-shadow:inset 0 0 60px 10px rgba(13,19,22,0.5);
    border:1px solid var(--gold-line);
  }
  .map-embed iframe{width:100%; height:100%; border:0; display:block; filter:sepia(0.12) saturate(1.1) contrast(1.02);}
  .map-caption{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-top:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px;}
  .map-caption span{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono'; font-size:11.5px; color:#8A8778; letter-spacing:.06em; text-transform:uppercase;}

  footer{background:var(--steel-2); color:#8A8778; padding:34px 0; font-size:13px;}
  .footer-row{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:14px;}
  .footer-row .brand .name{color:#F1EFE6;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="cursor-dot"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>

<header id="site-header">
  <nav class="wrap">
    <a href="#hero" class="brand">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="HNP Builders Ghana Limited logo">
      <div class="name">HNP BUILDERS<span>GHANA LIMITED · TEMA</span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#services">Services</a>
      <a href="#work">Our Work</a>
      <a href="#offers">Land &amp; Homes</a>
      <a href="#reviews">Reviews</a>
      <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-cta">
      <a href="tel:+233595082772" class="btn btn-gold" data-cursor="big">Call 059 508 2772</a>
    </div>
    <button class="menu-toggle" id="menu-open" aria-label="Open menu"><span></span><span></span><span></span></button>
  </nav>
</header>

<div id="mobile-menu">
  <button class="close-btn" id="menu-close" aria-label="Close menu">&times;</button>
  <a href="#services">Services</a>
  <a href="#work">Our Work</a>
  <a href="#offers">Land &amp; Homes</a>
  <a href="#reviews">Reviews</a>
  <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  <a href="tel:+233595082772" class="btn btn-gold" style="margin-top:10px;">Call Now</a>
</div>

<!-- ================= HERO ================= -->
<section id="hero">
  <canvas id="hero-canvas"></canvas>
  <div class="hero-grain"></div>
  <div class="wrap hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="rating-pill"><span class="stars">★★★★★</span> 4.7 rated on Google · 3 reviews</div>
        <h1 class="headline">Building<br>tomorrow, <em>together.</em></h1>
        <p class="hero-sub">HNP Builders Ghana Limited is a full-service construction and real estate company based in Tema — from surveying and architectural drawing to blockwork, roofing, and finishing. We also sell titled, litigation‑free land and homes across Greater Accra.</p>
        <div class="hero-cta-row">
          <a href="tel:+233595082772" class="btn btn-gold" data-cursor="big">Call 059 508 2772</a>
          <a href="#work" class="btn btn-line" data-cursor="big">See Our Work</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-meta">
          <div><strong>Tema</strong>Head Office</div>
          <div><strong>10+</strong>Trades In-House</div>
          <div><strong>4</strong>Estates: Tema · Prampram · Tsopoli · Agbogba</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-side-card">
        <div class="tag">Recently Handed Over</div>
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,

" alt="Completed two-storey HNP Builders home with balcony and pergola">
        <h3>From foundation to front door</h3>
        <p style="font-size:14px;">A finished HNP residence — the same crew that pours the footings finishes the balcony.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-cue"><span>Scroll</span><span class="line"></span></div>
</section>

<!-- ================= TICKER ================= -->
<div class="ticker-band">
  <div class="ticker-track" id="ticker-track"></div>
</div>

<!-- ================= SERVICES ================= -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">What We Do</div>
      <h2>Every trade a build needs, under one roof.</h2>
      <p>HNP Builders runs the full sequence of a project — survey the land, draw the plan, build it, wire it, roof it, and finish it — instead of handing you between contractors.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-grid reveal" id="svc-grid"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ================= STATS ================= -->
<div class="stats-band">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">4.7★</div><p>Average Google rating from Tema clients</p></div>
      <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">10+</div><p>Services in-house, from demolition to fan installation</p></div>
      <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">4</div><p>Active estates across Greater Accra</p></div>
      <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">100%</div><p>Titled, court-verified land documents</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ================= WORK GALLERY ================= -->
<section id="work" style="padding-left:0; padding-right:0;">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">On Site</div>
      <h2>A look at the work in progress.</h2>
      <p>From cleared land to occupied homes — drag or scroll through recent groundwork, builds, and equipment on our sites in Tema and beyond.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="gallery-stage">
    <div class="gcard"><div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,

" alt="Foundation trenches and blockwork at an HNP Builders site"></div><div class="cap"><div class="tag">Groundworks</div><h3>Foundation &amp; blockwork underway</h3></div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,

" alt="Completed modern two-storey home"></div><div class="cap"><div class="tag">Handover</div><h3>A finished HNP residence</h3></div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,

" alt="Blockwork foundation walls being laid"></div><div class="cap"><div class="tag">Early Build</div><h3>Setting the blocks</h3></div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
" alt="Backhoe loaders staged for land development"></div><div class="cap"><div class="tag">Equipment</div><h3>Heavy machinery on standby</h3></div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,




" alt="Crew paving an access road with asphalt"></div><div class="cap"><div class="tag">Infrastructure</div><h3>Access roads, paved and ready</h3></div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="ph"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,

" alt="Site cleared for construction in Tema"></div><div class="cap"><div class="tag">Land Prep</div><h3>Clearing the way for new plots</h3></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ================= OFFERS ================= -->
<section id="offers">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Land &amp; Housing</div>
      <h2>Own a plot, or move into a finished home.</h2>
      <p>Registered, demarcated, litigation-free plots and family homes across four growing communities — as advertised in our latest promotion.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="offer-wrap reveal">
      <img class="offer-flyer" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
" alt="HNP Builders Ghana Limited promotional flyer for land, houses and building construction">
      <div>
        <div class="offer-cards">
          <div class="offer-card">
            <div><h4>Prampram</h4><div class="loc-tag">Serviced Plots</div></div>
            <div class="price">GH₵ 25,000 – 90,000</div>
          </div>
          <div class="offer-card">
            <div><h4>Tema Community 25</h4><div class="loc-tag">Serviced Plots</div></div>
            <div class="price">GH₵ 18,000 – 90,000</div>
          </div>
          <div class="offer-card">
            <div><h4>Tsopoli</h4><div class="loc-tag">Serviced Plots</div></div>
            <div class="price">GH₵ 16,000+</div>
          </div>
          <div class="offer-card">
            <div><h4>Family Villa</h4><div class="loc-tag">Luxury Gated Residence</div></div>
            <div class="price">GH₵ 35,000 + 40,000</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p class="offer-note">Pricing shown as advertised by HNP Builders Ghana Limited and may change. Call 059 508 2772 to confirm current rates, plot sizes and availability.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ================= REVIEWS ================= -->
<section id="reviews">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Reputation</div>
      <h2>Rated by the clients we've built for.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="review-wrap reveal">
      <div class="review-score">
        <div class="big">4.7</div>
        <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p>Based on 3 Google reviews for HNP Builders Ghana Limited, Tema</p>
        <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/HNP+Builders+Ghana+Limited+Tema" class="btn btn-line" style="margin-top:18px;">Read &amp; Leave a Review</a>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-list">
        <div class="trust-item">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
          <div><h4>Titled, court-verified documents</h4><p>Every plot we sell comes free of litigation, with documentation you can verify.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="trust-item">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
          <div><h4>One contractor, every trade</h4><p>Surveying, drawing, building, electrical, and finishing — no handoffs between separate companies.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="trust-item">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
          <div><h4>Local, based in Tema</h4><p>On the ground across Tema, Prampram, Tsopoli and Agbogba — not a call centre.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ================= CONTACT ================= -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Get In Touch</div>
      <h2>Let's talk about your build.</h2>
      <p>Call for a quote, or stop by to see current sites and available plots.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="contact-line">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.127.96.362 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.907.338 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z"/></svg>
          <div><div class="lbl">Phone</div><div class="val"><a href="tel:+233595082772">059 508 2772</a></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-line">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg>
          <div><div class="lbl">Location</div><div class="val">Tema, Greater Accra Region, Ghana</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-line">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>
          <div><div class="lbl">Hours</div><div class="val">Mon – Sat · Opens 7:30 AM</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="map-embed">
          <iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=HNP%20Builders%20Ghana%20Limited%2C%20Tema%2C%20Ghana&z=13&output=embed" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade" title="Map showing HNP Builders Ghana Limited in Tema, Ghana"></iframe>
        </div>
        <div class="map-caption">
          <span>Tema, Greater Accra Region</span>
          <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=HNP+Builders+Ghana+Limited+Tema" class="btn btn-line-light" data-cursor="big" style="padding:9px 16px; font-size:12.5px;">Get Directions</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-card">
        <h3>Follow the build</h3>
        <p style="color:#B9B4A2; font-size:14px;">See more finished homes and available plots on our social pages.</p>
        <div class="social-row">
          <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/HNP-Builders-Ghana-Limited-100075672858476/" aria-label="Facebook" data-cursor="big">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22 12a10 10 0 1 0-11.56 9.88v-6.99H7.9V12h2.54V9.8c0-2.5 1.49-3.89 3.77-3.89 1.09 0 2.23.2 2.23.2v2.45h-1.26c-1.24 0-1.63.77-1.63 1.56V12h2.78l-.44 2.89h-2.34v6.99A10 10 0 0 0 22 12z"/></svg>
          </a>
          <a href="https://www.instagram.com/hnpbuildersghanalimited/" aria-label="Instagram" data-cursor="big">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1"/></svg>
          </a>
        </div>
        <a href="tel:+233595082772" class="btn btn-gold" style="margin-top:24px; width:100%; justify-content:center;">Call Now</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap footer-row">
    <div class="brand"><img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="HNP Builders logo" style="width:30px;height:30px;"><div class="name">HNP BUILDERS GHANA LIMITED</div></div>
    <div>© <span id="year"></span> HNP Builders Ghana Limited · Tema, Ghana · Building tomorrow, together.</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js"></script>
<script>
document.getElementById('year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

/* ============ Mobile menu ============ */
const menuOpen = document.getElementById('menu-open');
const menuClose = document.getElementById('menu-close');
const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
menuOpen.addEventListener('click', ()=> mobileMenu.classList.add('open'));
menuClose.addEventListener('click', ()=> mobileMenu.classList.remove('open'));
mobileMenu.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', ()=> mobileMenu.classList.remove('open')));

/* ============ Header scroll state ============ */
const header = document.getElementById('site-header');
window.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
  header.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);
}, {passive:true});

/* ============ Custom cursor ============ */
const isFine = window.matchMedia('(pointer:fine)').matches;
if(isFine){
  const dot = document.getElementById('cursor-dot');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
  let mx=innerWidth/2,my=innerHeight/2, rx=mx, ry=my;
  window.addEventListener('mousemove', e=>{ mx=e.clientX; my=e.clientY; dot.style.transform=`translate(${mx}px,${my}px) translate(-50%,-50%)`; });
  function ringLoop(){
    rx += (mx-rx)*0.18; ry += (my-ry)*0.18;
    ring.style.transform = `translate(${rx}px,${ry}px) translate(-50%,-50%)`;
    requestAnimationFrame(ringLoop);
  }
  ringLoop();
  document.querySelectorAll('a,button,[data-cursor]').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', ()=> ring.classList.add('big'));
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', ()=> ring.classList.remove('big'));
  });
} else {
  document.getElementById('cursor-dot').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('cursor-ring').style.display='none';
}

/* ============ Reveal on scroll ============ */
/* ============ Active nav link on scroll (single-page navigation) ============ */
const navLinks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a'));
const navSections = navLinks.map(a => document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'))).filter(Boolean);
function updateActiveNav(){
  let current = navSections[0];
  const probe = window.scrollY + window.innerHeight * 0.35;
  navSections.forEach(sec => { if (sec.offsetTop <= probe) current = sec; });
  navLinks.forEach(a => a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('href') === '#' + current.id));
}
window.addEventListener('scroll', updateActiveNav, {passive:true});
window.addEventListener('load', updateActiveNav);
updateActiveNav();

const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(en=>{ if(en.isIntersecting){ en.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(en.target); } });
}, {threshold:0.15});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=> io.observe(el));

/* ============ Services data + render ============ */
const services = [
  {t:'Building Construction', d:'Full builds from groundbreaking to handover — homes, apartments and commercial spaces.', i:'M3 21h18M5 21V9l7-5 7 5v12M9 21v-6h6v6'},
  {t:'Architectural Drawing', d:'Site plans and drawings that turn a plot into a blueprint you can build from.', i:'M4 19h16M4 19V5h10l6 6v8M14 5v6h6'},
  {t:'Land Surveying', d:'Accurate boundary and site surveys before a single block goes down.', i:'M12 2v6M12 22v-6M2 12h6M22 12h-6M5 5l3 3M19 19l-3-3M5 19l3-3M19 5l-3 3'},
  {t:'Demolition', d:'Safe teardown and clearing to make way for what&#39;s next.', i:'M4 20l6-6M20 4l-6 6M9 9l6 6M3 21l4-1 1-4L18 6l1-4-4 1L5 13l-2 8z'},
  {t:'Roofing', d:'Trusses, sheeting and weatherproofing built to last the harmattan and the rains.', i:'M3 12L12 4l9 8M5 10v10h14V10'},
  {t:'Electrical Work', d:'Wiring, fittings and fan installation done to code, room by room.', i:'M13 2L4 14h7l-1 8 9-12h-7l1-8z'},
  {t:'Drywall Repair', d:'Partition and drywall patch-ups, finished clean and flush.', i:'M3 3h18v18H3zM3 9h18M9 21V9'},
  {t:'Painting', d:'Interior and exterior finishing that protects the build and impresses.', i:'M19 3l2 2-9 9-3 1 1-3 9-9zM7 17c-1 1-1 3-4 4 1-3 1-5 4-4z'},
  {t:'Fan Installation', d:'Ceiling and wall units fitted and balanced for a quiet finish.', i:'M12 12l6-2c0 3-2 5-6 5zM12 12l-2 6c-3 0-5-2-5-6zM12 12l-6 2c0-3 2-5 6-5zM12 12l2-6c3 0 5 2 5 6z'},
];
const grid = document.getElementById('svc-grid');
services.forEach((s,idx)=>{
  const card = document.createElement('div');
  card.className='svc-card';
  card.innerHTML = `<div class="inner">
    <span class="svc-num">0${idx+1}</span>
    <svg class="svc-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="${s.i}"/></svg>
    <h3>${s.t}</h3><p>${s.d}</p>
  </div>`;
  grid.appendChild(card);
  const inner = card.querySelector('.inner');
  card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e)=>{
    const r = card.getBoundingClientRect();
    const px = (e.clientX - r.left)/r.width - 0.5;
    const py = (e.clientY - r.top)/r.height - 0.5;
    inner.style.transform = `rotateY(${px*10}deg) rotateX(${-py*10}deg) translateZ(6px)`;
  });
  card.addEventListener('mouseleave', ()=>{ inner.style.transform = 'rotateY(0) rotateX(0)'; });
});

/* ============ Ticker ============ */
const tickerWords = ['Demolition','Drywall Repair','Exterior Painting','Fan Installation','Electrical Work','Building Construction','Surveying','Roofing','Architectural Drawing'];
const track = document.getElementById('ticker-track');
for(let r=0;r<2;r++){
  tickerWords.forEach(w=>{
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className='ticker-item';
    el.innerHTML = `${w} <span class="dot">◆</span>`;
    track.appendChild(el);
  });
}

/* ============ Gallery coverflow tilt ============ */
const stage = document.getElementById('gallery-stage');
const gcards = Array.from(stage.querySelectorAll('.gcard'));
function updateGallery(){
  const stageRect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
  const centerX = stageRect.left + stageRect.width/2;
  gcards.forEach(c=>{
    const r = c.getBoundingClientRect();
    const cardCenter = r.left + r.width/2;
    const dist = (cardCenter - centerX) / (stageRect.width/2);
    const clamped = Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, dist));
    const rotY = clamped * -18;
    const scale = 1 - Math.abs(clamped)*0.12;
    const z = -Math.abs(clamped)*80;
    c.style.transform = `perspective(1200px) rotateY(${rotY}deg) scale(${scale}) translateZ(${z}px)`;
    c.style.opacity = 1 - Math.abs(clamped)*0.25;
  });
}
stage.addEventListener('scroll', updateGallery, {passive:true});
window.addEventListener('resize', updateGallery);
updateGallery();

/* ================================================================
   THREE.JS HERO: golden crane that tracks the mouse + floating blocks
   ================================================================ */
(function(){
  const canvas = document.getElementById('hero-canvas');
  const heroSection = document.getElementById('hero');
  const prefersReduced = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  let width = heroSection.clientWidth, height = heroSection.clientHeight;

  const scene = new THREE.Scene();
  const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(42, width/height, 0.1, 100);
  camera.position.set(0, 5.2, 13);
  camera.lookAt(0,2,0);

  const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({canvas, alpha:true, antialias:true});
  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
  renderer.setSize(width, height);

  // lights
  scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xfff2d6, 0.85));
  const sun = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffe2a3, 1.1);
  sun.position.set(6, 10, 4);
  scene.add(sun);
  const fill = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.35);
  fill.position.set(-6, 4, -4);
  scene.add(fill);

  // ground blueprint grid
  const grid = new THREE.GridHelper(34, 34, 0xB9860B, 0xB9860B);
  grid.material.opacity = 0.16;
  grid.material.transparent = true;
  grid.position.y = -0.02;
  scene.add(grid);

  const goldMat = (metalness=0.55, roughness=0.35, color=0xD9A227) => new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color, metalness, roughness});
  const steelMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x2b3238, metalness:0.6, roughness:0.5});
  const darkMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x171f24, metalness:0.4, roughness:0.6});

  /* ---- Crane ---- */
  const crane = new THREE.Group();
  crane.position.set(-2.6, 0, -1.5);
  scene.add(crane);

  const baseGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.1,0.4,1.1);
  const base = new THREE.Mesh(baseGeo, steelMat);
  base.position.y = 0.2;
  crane.add(base);

  const mastHeight = 7.2;
  const mastGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.16,0.2,mastHeight,8);
  const mast = new THREE.Mesh(mastGeo, goldMat(0.6,0.3));
  mast.position.y = mastHeight/2 + 0.4;
  crane.add(mast);

  // mast lattice rings for detail
  for(let i=0;i<6;i++){
    const ringGeo = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.2, 0.02, 6, 12);
    const ring = new THREE.Mesh(ringGeo, steelMat);
    ring.rotation.x = Math.PI/2;
    ring.position.y = 0.9 + i*1.15;
    crane.add(ring);
  }

  const cab = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5,0.45,0.5), darkMat);
  cab.position.y = mastHeight + 0.5;
  crane.add(cab);

  // jib group pivots at top of mast to point at mouse
  const jibPivot = new THREE.Group();
  jibPivot.position.y = mastHeight + 0.65;
  crane.add(jibPivot);

  const jibLength = 5.2;
  const jib = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(jibLength,0.22,0.22), goldMat(0.6,0.3));
  jib.position.x = jibLength/2 + 0.3;
  jibPivot.add(jib);

  const counterJib = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.6,0.2,0.2), steelMat);
  counterJib.position.x = -1.1;
  jibPivot.add(counterJib);

  const counterWeight = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.55,0.55,0.4), darkMat);
  counterWeight.position.set(-1.7, -0.15, 0);
  jibPivot.add(counterWeight);

  // support cables (visual only, thin lines)
  const cableMat = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({color:0x8a8778});
  function addCable(from, to){
    const geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([from,to]);
    jibPivot.add(new THREE.Line(geo, cableMat));
  }
  addCable(new THREE.Vector3(0,0.6,0), new THREE.Vector3(jibLength*0.85,0,0));
  addCable(new THREE.Vector3(0,0.6,0), new THREE.Vector3(-1.6,0,0));

  // trolley + hook hanging from jib end area, animated slight sway
  const trolley = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.22,0.14,0.22), darkMat);
  trolley.position.set(jibLength*0.78, -0.15, 0);
  jibPivot.add(trolley);
  const hookLineGeo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(0,0,0), new THREE.Vector3(0,-1.6,0)]);
  const hookLine = new THREE.Line(hookLineGeo, cableMat);
  trolley.add(hookLine);
  const hook = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.09,8,8), steelMat);
  hook.position.y = -1.65;
  trolley.add(hook);

  /* ---- Floating gold blocks (bricks/buildings) ---- */
  const blocks = [];
  const blockGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1,1,1);
  const positions = [
    [3.2,2.2,-2],[4.6,4.5,-4],[1.6,5.8,-3],[5.6,1.6,-1],[-4.4,3.4,-3],
    [2.4,7.2,-5],[-1.2,6.4,-4.5],[4.2,6.8,-2.5],[-3,1.4,1],[6.2,3.6,-3.5],
    [0.2,4.2,-6],[3.6,0.9,2.2]
  ];
  positions.forEach((p,i)=>{
    const scale = 0.28 + Math.random()*0.4;
    const mat = goldMat(0.5 + Math.random()*0.3, 0.25 + Math.random()*0.3, i%3===0 ? 0xE6B23C : 0xC9962B);
    const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(blockGeo, mat);
    mesh.scale.setScalar(scale);
    mesh.position.set(p[0], p[1], p[2]);
    mesh.rotation.set(Math.random()*Math.PI, Math.random()*Math.PI, 0);
    mesh.userData = {
      speed: 0.15 + Math.random()*0.3,
      baseY: p[1],
      bobAmp: 0.15 + Math.random()*0.2,
      bobSpeed: 0.4 + Math.random()*0.5,
      phase: Math.random()*Math.PI*2
    };
    scene.add(mesh);
    blocks.push(mesh);
  });

  /* ---- Simple low-poly "houses" scattered as skyline silhouette ---- */
  const houseGroupPositions = [[7.5,0,-6],[9,0,-4],[-7,0,-5],[-8.5,0,-2.5]];
  houseGroupPositions.forEach((p,i)=>{
    const g = new THREE.Group();
    const h = 1.4 + Math.random()*1.6;
    const body = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.3,h,1.3), new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0xEDE7D6, metalness:0.05, roughness:0.9}));
    body.position.y = h/2;
    g.add(body);
    const roof = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.ConeGeometry(1.05,0.7,4), goldMat(0.4,0.4,0xB9860B));
    roof.rotation.y = Math.PI/4;
    roof.position.y = h + 0.35;
    g.add(roof);
    g.position.set(p[0],0,p[1] !== undefined ? p[2] : -5);
    g.position.set(p[0], 0, p[2]);
    scene.add(g);
  });

  /* ---- Mouse tracking: raycast to ground plane, crane jib points there ---- */
  const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
  const groundPlane = new THREE.Plane(new THREE.Vector3(0,1,0), 0);
  const mouseNDC = new THREE.Vector2(0,0);
  const targetPoint = new THREE.Vector3(4,0,2);
  let mouseXNorm = 0, mouseYNorm = 0;

  function onPointerMove(clientX, clientY){
    const rect = heroSection.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = clientX - rect.left;
    const y = clientY - rect.top;
    mouseXNorm = (x/rect.width)*2 - 1;
    mouseYNorm = -(y/rect.height)*2 + 1;
    mouseNDC.set(mouseXNorm, mouseYNorm);
  }
  window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e)=> onPointerMove(e.clientX, e.clientY));
  window.addEventListener('touchmove', (e)=>{ if(e.touches[0]) onPointerMove(e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY); }, {passive:true});

  const craneBaseWorld = new THREE.Vector3();
  const clock = new THREE.Clock();

  function animate(){
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    const t = clock.getElapsedTime();

    if(!prefersReduced){
      // raycast mouse to ground plane
      raycaster.setFromCamera(mouseNDC, camera);
      const hit = new THREE.Vector3();
      if(raycaster.ray.intersectPlane(groundPlane, hit)){
        targetPoint.lerp(hit, 0.04);
      }

      // point jib toward target
      crane.getWorldPosition(craneBaseWorld);
      const dx = targetPoint.x - craneBaseWorld.x;
      const dz = targetPoint.z - craneBaseWorld.z;
      const angle = Math.atan2(dz, dx);
      jibPivot.rotation.y += (( -angle) - jibPivot.rotation.y) * 0.045;

      // hook sway
      trolley.position.x = jibLength*0.78 + Math.sin(t*0.6)*0.15;

      // floating blocks bob + rotate
      blocks.forEach(b=>{
        b.rotation.x += 0.003 * b.userData.speed * 10 * 0.02;
        b.rotation.y += 0.004 * b.userData.speed * 10 * 0.02;
        b.position.y = b.userData.baseY + Math.sin(t*b.userData.bobSpeed + b.userData.phase) * b.userData.bobAmp;
      });

      // camera parallax
      camera.position.x += ((mouseXNorm*1.4) - camera.position.x) * 0.03;
      camera.position.y += ((5.2 + mouseYNorm*0.6) - camera.position.y) * 0.03;
      camera.lookAt(0,2.4,0);
    }

    renderer.render(scene, camera);
  }
  animate();

  function onResize(){
    width = heroSection.clientWidth;
    height = heroSection.clientHeight;
    camera.aspect = width/height;
    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
    renderer.setSize(width, height);
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize', onResize);
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
